action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP ViT-B/16 + linear head (3 epochs full FT) gave worst-region acc 0.0019 / overall 0.022 (barely above random), first-epoch NaN, val acc ~2%. Analysis: full backbone FT with LR=1e-4 ineffective for quick learning on this shift-heavy task; head undertrained, NaNs suggest instability. Decision: freeze vision backbone (linear probe on strong pretrained features), train classifier only with higher LR=1e-3 + 15 epochs, add H/V flips aug (suitable for overhead sat imagery), use val worst-region acc (computed over 5 regions, ignore -1) for best checkpoint selection, add grad clipping. This should yield big gains in worst-region acc while staying under time/iter budget (prior iter ~17min for 3eps → ~1.4h for 15eps). Keep predict.py/model.py unchanged.
